name_en: Palais Carnolès – Museum of Fine Arts

phrases.context: The permanent collection is free. The palace was the summer residence of the Princes of Monaco and sits in a citrus garden.
The surrounding citrus grove is one of the largest in Europe and is free to walk through year-round.

tips: Permanent collection is free — one of the few free museums on the Riviera
The citrus grove around the palace has over 100 varieties of citrus — beautiful and fragrant in winter
